articles.title: Apple tests new iOS and iPadOS updates
articles.summary: Apple gave developers early versions of iOS and iPadOS. This is for testing new features. They will be released soon.
articles.impact: Developers are testing new Apple software updates.

articles.title: Rocket League gets new look with Unreal Engine 6
articles.summary: Rocket League gets a big visual upgrade. It uses Unreal Engine 6. This will make the game look much better.
articles.impact: Rocket League will have a major graphical overhaul.

articles.title: New Lego city-building game is rumored
articles.summary: A new Lego city-building game called Skylines is rumored. Paradox might make it. This is based on game ratings.
articles.impact: A Lego city builder like Skylines may be in development.

articles.title: Oppo Bubble helps take better selfies
articles.summary: Oppo made a small screen called Bubble. It sticks to your phone. You see yourself to take better selfies with the back camera.
articles.impact: Oppo's accessory helps use rear cameras for selfies.

articles.title: Windows Space Cadet pinball is back
articles.summary: The old Windows game Space Cadet pinball gets a real version. It will be a physical pinball machine. This brings back a classic.
articles.impact: A physical pinball machine based on the Windows game is coming.

articles.title: Dragon Quest team stream announced
articles.summary: Square Enix will stream updates. The Dragon Quest team will share news. It's a short, ten-minute broadcast.
articles.impact: The Dragon Quest team will share news in a short live stream.

articles.title: Backpack melted on hot Corvette engine
articles.summary: A backpack was on a hot car engine. It was a Corvette C8. The bag melted. The car almost caught fire.
articles.impact: A backpack melted after being placed on a hot Corvette engine.

articles.title: The Free Press launches community initiatives
articles.summary: The Free Press starts new community events. They will have forums and clubs. The goal is to get people to think for themselves.
articles.impact: The Free Press is launching new community programs.
